headline: AvalonBay CEO Joins PulteGroup Board As Valuation Gap Draws Attention
summary: AvalonBay Communities CEO Benjamin Schall has been nominated to join the Board of Directors of PulteGroup. The nomination links leadership at NYSE:AVB with another large US real estate player, creating a new governance connection between the two companies. AvalonBay Communities, traded on the NYSE under the ticker AVB, most recently closed at $168.5. Over the past 3 years the stock has returned 10.2%, and over 5 years it has returned 7.3%, while the 1 year return stands at a 12.6% decline...
